/usr/bin/ar qc liba11y-lib.a "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/nux-area-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/nux-base-window-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/nux-layout-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/nux-object-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/nux-text-entry-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/nux-view-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-dash-view-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-expander-view-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-filter-basic-button-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-launcher-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-launcher-icon-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-panel-view-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-places-group-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-quicklist-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-quicklist-menu-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-quicklist-menu-item-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-result-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-root-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-rvgrid-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-scope-bar-icon-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-sctext-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-search-bar-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-session-button-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-switcher-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-text-input-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unity-util-accessible.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unitya11y.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/a11y-lib.dir/unitya11ytests.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib liba11y-lib.a
